ideas.name: vehir-axiom
ideas.author: Vehir
ideas.description: The constitution is physics. The agent is shaped by laws it cannot bend — and grows only because it cannot.

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Foundational path resolution — every tool needs to find its config, sockets, and data directories at runtime without hardcoded paths

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Database access substrate — all agent memory and state lives in PostgreSQL, accessed through a parameterized query interface with strict error handling

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Secrets and configuration broker — every tool resolves credentials by name through one audited layer, never from environment or command line

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Pain signal system — cognitive mode switching based on system health, providing the feedback loop that makes the enforcement architecture a real physics

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Documentation graph generator — keeps the package graph visible and up to date so agents and humans can see the system state at a glance
